revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ombox|text=This template is a [[:Category:Citation Style 2 templates|Citation Style 2 template]] based on {{#switch:{{lc:{{str left|{{{base}}}|7}}}} |module:=[[{{{base}}}]]. |#default={{tl|{{ucfirst:{{{base}}}}}}}. }} For centrali{{#switch:{{lc:{{{spell|}}}}}|z=z|s|#default=s}}ed [[Help:Citation Style 2|Citation Style 2]] discussions, see [[:en:Help talk:Citation Style 2|Help talk:Citation Style 2]].}}<includeonly>{{category handler |template = {{#switch:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}} |doc |sandbox |testcases=<noinclude><!-- do not categorize template maintenance subpages --> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> |#default=}} |nocat = {{{nocat|}}} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates that wrap {{ucfirst:{{{base}}}}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CS2_wrapper here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CS2_wrapper for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ombox|text=This template is a [[:Category:Citation Style 2 templates|Citation Style 2 template]] based on {{#switch:{{lc:{{str left|{{{base}}}|7}}}}
|module:=[[{{{base}}}]].
|#default={{tl|{{ucfirst:{{{base}}}}}}}.
}} For centrali{{#switch:{{lc:{{{spell|}}}}}|z=z|s|#default=s}}ed [[Help:Citation Style 2|Citation Style 2]] discussions, see [[:en:Help talk:Citation Style 2|Help talk:Citation Style 2]].}}<includeonly>{{category handler
|template = {{#switch:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}
  |doc
  |sandbox
  |testcases=<noinclude><!-- do not categorize template maintenance subpages -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>
  |#default=}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates that wrap {{ucfirst:{{{base}}}}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
